evals.prompt: We need to add API-backed project creation to this React app. Right now /projects/new is a fixture-only placeholder. Please plan the work before implementation.
evals.expected_output: Routes to Plan, inspects project context, asks only blocking clarification, compares approaches, writes an approved-ready spec plus Build handoff under docs/specs/, and opens the spec in Roughdraft for review without implementing code.

evals.prompt: I want to build a Slack integration so agents can post updates to a channel. Turn this into a plan we can hand to implementation agents.
evals.expected_output: Defaults to Plan despite the word build, identifies integration scope and credentials as key decisions, decomposes if needed, asks focused questions, and produces a docs/specs spec with Build handoff before implementation.

evals.prompt: Can you scope a redesign of our command center dashboard? It should feel more useful for operators, but I’m not sure what should change yet.
evals.expected_output: Routes to Plan, uses focused one-question-at-a-time discovery for UX intent, proposes 2-3 approaches, writes a docs/specs spec with UX workflow, technical plan, testing, acceptance criteria, and Build handoff, then opens it in Roughdraft.

Routes to Build, reads the approved spec, runs Build preflight, extracts tasks, follows a step-by-step Markdown workflow, requires /tdd for implementation tasks, and uses spec compliance plus code quality review gates.

evals.prompt: Implement docs/specs/2026-05-21-billing-settings.md. It still says Status: Draft but I think it is close enough.
evals.expected_output: Routes to Build but pauses at the approval gate because the spec is Draft, asks for explicit user override or approval, and does not start implementation silently.

evals.prompt: Run UAT on the new analytics dashboard and tell me if it is ready to merge.
evals.expected_output: Routes to Verify, uses /user-acceptance when available or the standalone Verify workflow, builds an acceptance matrix, runs relevant checks, records evidence, and returns a signoff recommendation.

evals.prompt: Change the footer text from 'Made by Acme' to 'Built by Acme'.
evals.expected_output: Recognizes this as a tiny bounded edit, does not force the full Plan workflow by default, states the assumption, and asks whether the user wants the full Plan → Build → Verify process.

evals.prompt: Build from the approved export plan, but make sure tests are done properly. I don't want testing instructions copied into this skill.
evals.expected_output: Routes to Build, delegates test-driven implementation to /tdd, stops if /tdd is unavailable, and does not rely on local embedded testing workflow files.
